description: 20 Microsoft enterprise IT helpdesk scenarios — Azure, M365, Windows (Set MS)

cases.title: Azure AD Conditional Access Blocking Teams Login
cases.description: Cannot sign in to Microsoft Teams on corporate laptop — Azure AD Conditional Access policy blocks login with error AADSTS53003. Need access for executive briefing in 30 minutes.

cases.title: SharePoint Online Site Collection 503 Errors
cases.description: SharePoint Online intranet site returns HTTP 503 for all users in Redmond campus since 9 AM PST. Site collection SPO-ENG-PORTAL shows service unavailable in admin center.

cases.title: Defender Alert — Lateral Movement on Azure VM
cases.description: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint alert: suspected lateral movement detected on Azure VM WIN-PROD-4412 in East US subscription. Multiple failed RDP attempts from compromised service account.

cases.title: Surface Laptop Docking Station Dual Monitor Failure
cases.description: Surface Laptop 5 on docking station — external dual monitors not detected after Windows 11 23H2 update. USB-C dock LED solid white but displays show no signal.

cases.title: Azure SQL Managed Instance Failover Stuck
cases.description: Azure SQL Managed Instance MI-PROD-CRM failover operation stuck in progress for 45 minutes. Application teams report connection timeouts to *.database.windows.net endpoint.

cases.title: ExpressRoute Circuit BGP Session Down
cases.description: Azure ExpressRoute circuit ER-SEA-01 BGP session down with ISP. Hybrid connectivity between on-prem Seattle datacenter and Azure VNet PROD-VNET lost. SAP workloads unreachable.

cases.title: Power Platform Flow Failing on Dataverse Connector
cases.description: Power Automate cloud flow HR-Onboarding-Flow fails at Dataverse connector step with error 502 Bad Gateway. 120 new hire provisioning tasks blocked since yesterday.

cases.title: Visual Studio Enterprise License Activation Failed
cases.description: Visual Studio 2022 Enterprise fails activation with error 0x80070005 access denied. Developer needs build access for .NET 8 microservices release tonight.

cases.title: New Hire M365 E5 and Azure RBAC Provisioning
cases.description: New program manager starts Monday — need Microsoft 365 E5 license, Azure subscription Reader role on DEV-RG, and Entra ID security group SG-PM-TEAM per onboarding ticket ONB-8821.

cases.title: Sentinel SIEM Correlation Rule False Positive Flood
cases.description: Microsoft Sentinel workspace producing 4000+ false positive alerts per hour from custom KQL correlation rule CORR-AZ-LOGIN. SOC analysts cannot triage real incidents.

cases.title: Windows Autopilot Enrollment Stuck at ESP
cases.description: Windows Autopilot enrollment stuck at Enrollment Status Page for 200 new devices in Dublin office. Devices show 'Setting up your device' for over 4 hours.

cases.title: Corporate Wi-Fi Certificate Expired on Surface Hub
cases.description: Surface Hub in conference room B12 cannot join corporate Wi-Fi — certificate expired on 802.1X authentication. Teams meetings on hub display fail with network error.

cases.title: Exchange Online Mailbox Quota Exceeded VP Inbox
cases.description: VP Finance mailbox over 99GB quota — cannot send or receive email. Exchange Online admin center shows ProhibitSendReceive quota reached. Needs urgent cleanup or archive policy.

cases.title: Phishing Report — Fake Microsoft Account Security Email
cases.description: Security incident: 15 employees reported phishing email impersonating Microsoft Account Team with link to fake login page. Three users clicked link before IT warning.

cases.title: Laptop Fan Noise and Thermal Shutdown
cases.description: Dell Latitude corporate laptop fan runs at maximum continuously and shuts down due to thermal protection during Teams video calls. Device only 14 months old.

cases.title: Azure DevOps Pipeline Agent Offline
cases.description: Self-hosted Azure DevOps pipeline agent pool PROD-AGENTS shows all 12 agents offline. Release pipeline for customer-facing API blocked — last successful deploy 18 hours ago.

cases.title: VPN Split Tunnel Not Routing Azure Private Endpoints
cases.description: Always On VPN split tunnel configuration not routing traffic to Azure private endpoints. Developers cannot reach storage account blob.core.windows.net over private link from home.

cases.title: Service Principal Secret Expired Breaking CI/CD
cases.description: Azure service principal app registration SP-DEPLOY-API client secret expired. GitHub Actions workflow failing with AADSTS7000222 invalid client secret on all production deployments.

cases.title: Cosmos DB RU Throttling on Production API
cases.description: Azure Cosmos DB container orders-prod hitting 429 Too Many Requests — request units throttled above 10,000 RU/s provisioned. Customer order API latency spiked to 8 seconds.

cases.title: BitLocker Recovery Key Request Lost Device
cases.description: Employee lost corporate laptop while traveling — need BitLocker recovery key from Entra ID to access encrypted drive for forensic imaging before wipe. Device tag MSFT-44192.
